offer: For property managers processing 10-20 utility bills/month, manual tracking causes cash flow gaps. We automate reporting instead of spreadsheets and manual entry.
problem: Manual tracking of utility expenses leads to errors and delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try monthly utility expense report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
